# Support

BriefLoop public project site: [briefloop.ai](https://briefloop.ai)

For human support and contact:

- General hello and product questions: [hello@briefloop.ai](mailto:hello@briefloop.ai)
- Partnerships, pilots, and contributor coordination: [contact@briefloop.ai](mailto:contact@briefloop.ai)
- Usage, setup, and documentation help: [help@briefloop.ai](mailto:help@briefloop.ai)
- Private security reports: [security@briefloop.ai](mailto:security@briefloop.ai)

For the full contact list and boundaries, see [docs/contact.md](../docs/contact.md).

These channels do not create a service-level agreement, delivery approval,
release authority, legal advice, compliance advice, investment advice, or
semantic-proof claim.
